name: Approach Shots Indoor Golf
about: Approach Shots Indoor Golf is a climate-controlled venue in Augusta, GA, utilizing state-of-the-art simulators to provide an indoor golf experience. The facility offers over 15,000 courses, a simulated driving range with swing metrics and video analysis, and personalized lessons from PGA professionals. It accommodates various activities including practice sessions, league play, corporate events, and tournaments, with a welcoming and laid-back atmosphere suitable for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round play in a climate-controlled environment
Access to over 15,000 courses including local Augusta favorites
Advanced swing metrics and video analysis for improvement
Welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: High-quality, affordable menu with options like chicken wings

faq.question: Do I need golf clubs?
faq.answer: We have a limited number of rental clubs available, and we provide a selection of golf balls for play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, we have a full kitchen serving high-quality, affordable food and beverages to complement your experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: On average, it takes one golfer 45 minutes to complete an 18-hole course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Approach Shots offers a welcoming atmosphere and multisport arcade games, making it suitable for families and kids.
